for i in range(32):
    fight('Hero') # Demon for demon_horn and piece_of_obsidian

# East side of the map

for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero') # Skeleton for skeleton_bone

move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(12):
    fight('Hero') # Vampire for vampire_blood
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(7):
    fight('Hero') # Owlbear for owlbear_hair
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(90):
    gather('Hero') # Dead Tree for dead_wood
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(333):
    gather('Hero') # Gold Rocks for gold_ore and gems

# Central area resources

for i in range(8):
    gather('Hero') # Magic Rocks for magical_cure

for i in range(30):
    gather('Hero') # Magic Tree for magic_wood

craft('Hero', 'gold_ring', 1)

# Equip the new gear set

equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'gold_ring', 1)

fight('Hero')

code:
# Part 1: Level up Mining skill to 35
# Level 1->10 (Needs 1710 XP -> 35 gathers of Lvl 1 resource)
move('Hero', 2, 0)
for i in range(35):
    gather('Hero')
# Level 10->20 (Needs 2850 XP -> 57 gathers of Lvl 10 resource)
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for i in range(57):
    gather('Hero')
# Level 20->35 (Needs XP for lvl 20->30: 3850 -> 77 gathers. XP for 30->35: 2300 -> 46 gathers. Total: 123 gathers of Lvl 20+ resource)
move('Hero', 1, 6)
for i in range(123):
    gather('Hero')

# Part 2: Level up Woodcutting skill to 35
# Level 1->10 (Needs 1710 XP -> 35 gathers of Lvl 1 resource)
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for i in range(35):
    gather('Hero')
# Level 10->20 (Needs 2850 XP -> 57 gathers of Lvl 10 resource)
move('Hero', 2, 6)
for i in range(57):
    gather('Hero')
# Level 20->35 (Needs 6150 XP -> 123 gathers of Lvl 20+ resource)
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for i in range(123):
    gather('Hero')

# Part 3: Gather materials for 'Greater Dreadful Amulet'
# Gather 5 'ogre_eye' from Ogres
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 5 'demon_horn' from Demons
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 2 'magical_cure' from Magic Rocks (req lvl 20)
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 35 'strange_ore' from Strange Rocks (req lvl 35) and 1 'diamond' (req Lvl 35)
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(36):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 21 'gold_ore' from Gold Rocks (req lvl 30)
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(21):
    gather('Hero')

# Part 4: Craft 'Strangold' and 'Greater Dreadful Amulet'
# Craft 7 'strangold'
move('Hero', 1, 5) # Mining station
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 7)
# Craft 'Greater Dreadful Amulet'
move('Hero', 1, 3) # Jewelry station
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# Part 5: Equip amulet and defeat Lich for Life Crystal
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet')
move('Hero', 9, 7) # Lich location
fight('Hero')
equip('Hero', 'artifact1', 'life_crystal')

# Part 6: Defeat the Reaper
move('Hero', 9, 6) # Reaper location
fight('Hero')

# Phase 1: Hunt Monsters for Resources
# Gather 4 Ogre Eyes from Ogres
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for i in range(4):

move('Hero', 4, 8)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather 5 Wolf Hairs from Wolves
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather 18 Vampire Bloods from Vampires
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(18):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather 7 Red Cloths from Death Knights
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(7):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather 4 Skeleton Bones from Skeletons
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather 11 Demon Horns from Demons
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(11):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather 56 Pieces of Obsidian and 7 Demoniac Dusts from Imps
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for i in range(56):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather 10 Owlbear Hairs from Owlbears
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(10):
    fight('Hero')

# Phase 2: Gather Raw Resources
# Gather 152 Dead Wood and 1 Sap from Dead Trees
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(152):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather 248 Gold Ores from Gold Rocks
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(248):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather 24 Ash Wood from Ash Trees
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for i in range(24):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather 40 Birch Wood from Birch Trees
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather 4 Sapphires and 1 Ruby from Iron Rocks
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for i in range(5):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather 6 Magical Cures from Magic Rocks
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(6):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather 2 Jasper Crystals from Jasper Rocks
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')

# Phase 3: Crafting
# Craft planks at a Woodcutting station
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 19)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)

# Craft bars at a Mining station

craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 14)

# Craft jewelry at a Jewelrycrafting station

craft('Hero', 'sapphire_amulet', 1)
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 1)

# Craft the weapon at a Weaponcrafting station

craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)

# Craft gear at a Gearcrafting station

craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_helm', 1)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'lizard_boots', 1)

# Phase 4: Equip and Fight
# Unequip old items and equip the newly crafted set
unequip('Hero', 'weapon', 1)
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield', 1)
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'gold_helm', 1)
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 1)
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)
unequip('Hero', 'boots', 1)
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'lizard_boots', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'sapphire_ring', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'ruby_ring', 1)
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'sapphire_amulet', 1)

# Move to the Cultist Emperor and fight
move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')

Successfully created custom character - Hero.

code:
# Part 1: Farm materials from monsters
# Move to Death Knight and defeat it to get a better weapon
move('Hero', 8, 7)
fight('Hero')

# Move to Ogres and defeat 5 of them for ogre eyes
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Move to Demons and defeat 32 of them for demon horns and pieces of obsidian
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for _ in range(32):
    fight('Hero')

# Move to Vampires and defeat 10 of them for vampire blood
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for _ in range(10):
    fight('Hero')

# Part 2: Level up gathering skills
# Level up Mining from 1 to 35
move('Hero', 2, 0)  # Copper Rocks (Req Lvl 1)
for _ in range(39):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 1, 7)  # Iron Rocks (Req Lvl 10)
for _ in range(58):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 1, 6)  # Coal Rocks (Req Lvl 20)
for _ in range(77):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 10, -4) # Gold Rocks (Req Lvl 30)
for _ in range(48):
    gather('Hero')

# Level up Woodcutting from 1 to 30
move('Hero', -1, 0) # Ash Tree (Req Lvl 1)
for _ in range(39):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 1, 9)  # Spruce Tree (Req Lvl 10)
for _ in range(58):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 3, 5)  # Birch Tree (Req Lvl 20)
for _ in range(77):
    gather('Hero')

# Part 3: Gather final resources
move('Hero', 9, 8)  # Dead Tree
for _ in range(48):
    gather('Hero') # Collect 48 dead_wood

move('Hero', 10, -4) # Gold Rocks
for _ in range(209): # Collect 205 gold_ore, 3 sapphire, 1 ruby
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', -1, 7) # Strange Rocks
for _ in range(36): # Collect 35 strange_ore, 1 diamond
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 3, 6)  # Magic Rocks
for _ in range(7):
    gather('Hero') # Collect 7 magical_cure

# Part 4: Craft all items
# Craft intermediate materials
move('Hero', -2, -3) # Woodcutting Station
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)
move('Hero', 1, 5)   # Mining Station (Forge)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 23)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 8)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 7)

# Craft final gear
move('Hero', 3, 1)   # Gearcrafting Station
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
move('Hero', 1, 3)   # Jewelrycrafting Station
craft('Hero', 'ruby_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# Part 5: Equip the new gear
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'death_knight_sword')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'ruby_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'sapphire_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet')

# Part 6: Move to the Cultist Emperor and initiate the fight
move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')

# Part 1: Gather resources from monsters.
# Ogres for Ogre Eyes (12) and Ogre Skins (6)
move('Hero', -5, -4)
for i in range(12):
    fight('Hero')
# Vampires for Vampire Blood (5)
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')
# Death Knights for Red Cloth (10)
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(10):
    fight('Hero')
# Skeletons for Skeleton Bones (4)
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
# Demons for Demon Horns (11)
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(11):
    fight('Hero')
# Owlbears for Owlbear Hair (6)
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(6):
    fight('Hero')
# Imps for Demoniac Dust (4) and Pieces of Obsidian (24)
move('Hero', 0, 13)
for i in range(12):
    fight('Hero')
move('Hero', -1, 12)
for i in range(12):
    fight('Hero')
# Wolves for Wolf Hair (5)
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# Part 2: Gather raw materials.
# Mining resources
move('Hero', 10, -4) # Gold Rocks
for i in range(120):
    gather('Hero') # Gold Ore
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero') # Sapphire
for i in range(1):
    gather('Hero') # Ruby
move('Hero', 1, 7) # Iron Rocks
for i in range(42):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 1, 6) # Coal Rocks
for i in range(70):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 0, 6) # Jasper Rocks
for i in range(4):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 3, 6) # Magic Rocks
for i in range(1):
    gather('Hero')
# Woodcutting resources
move('Hero', 9, 8) # Dead Tree
for i in range(88):
    gather('Hero')
for i in range(1):
    gather('Hero') # Sap
move('Hero', -1, 0) # Ash Tree
for i in range(24):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 3, 5) # Birch Tree
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# Part 3: Craft all items.
# Process wood
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 11)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)
# Process ores and bars
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 15)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 6)
craft('Hero', 'steel', 14)
# Craft gear
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_platebody', 1)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_legs_armor', 1)
# Craft weapon
move('Hero', 2, 1)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_staff', 1)
# Craft jewelry
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'ruby_amulet', 1)
craft('Hero', 'dreadful_ring', 2)

# Part 4: Equip the new gear set.
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'greater_dreadful_staff')
unequip('Hero', 'shield')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'gold_platebody')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'obsidian_legs_armor')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'ruby_amulet')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'dreadful_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'dreadful_ring')

# Part 5: Defeat the Lich.
move('Hero', 9, 7)
fight('Hero')

# Gather resources from monsters
move('Hero', -5, -5)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero') # Ogre Eye
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(9):
    fight('Hero') # Demon Horn
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(6):
    fight('Hero') # Wolf Bone
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(6):
    fight('Hero') # Vampire Blood
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for i in range(6):
    fight('Hero') # Skeleton Bone

# Gather natural resources
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(96):
    gather('Hero') # Dead Wood
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(207):
    gather('Hero') # 205 Gold Ore, 2 Sapphire
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero') # Magical Cure
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(36):
    gather('Hero') # 35 Strange Ore, 1 Diamond

# Craft intermediate materials
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 12)
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 23)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 7)

# Craft final items
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'gold_ring', 2)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# Equip the new gear
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'gold_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'gold_ring')

# Fight the Bat
move('Hero', 11, 7)
fight('Hero')

# Phase 1: Leveling Skills

# Phase 2: Gathering Monster Drops

for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')

    fight('Hero')

for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

    fight('Hero')
# Get 4x owlbear_hair from Owlbear
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
# Get 36x piece_of_obsidian and 4x demoniac_dust from Imp
move('Hero', 0, 13)
for i in range(36):
    fight('Hero')
# Get 7x demon_horn from Demon
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(7):
    fight('Hero')
# Get 6x magic_stone and 4x cursed_book from Cultist Acolyte
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for i in range(10):
    fight('Hero')

# Phase 3: Gathering Natural Resources
# Get 1x sap from ash_tree
move('Hero', -1, 0)
gather('Hero')
# Get 2x jasper_crystal from jasper_rocks

for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')
# Get 141x gold_ore, 2x sapphire, 1x emerald from gold_rocks
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(144):
    gather('Hero')
# Get 8x magical_cure from magic_rocks
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(8):
    gather('Hero')
# Get 35x strange_ore, 1x diamond from strange_rocks
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(36):
    gather('Hero')
# Get 75x magic_wood, 2x magic_sap from magic_tree
move('Hero', -3, 7)
for i in range(77):
    gather('Hero')
# Get 93x dead_wood from dead_tree
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(93):
    gather('Hero')

# Phase 4: Crafting
# Craft intermediate resources

craft('Hero', 'gold', 15)

craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 9)

# Craft final items

craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'emerald_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'diamond_amulet', 1)
move('Hero', 2, 1)
craft('Hero', 'magic_bow', 1)

# Phase 5: Equipping Gear
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'magic_bow')

equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'diamond_amulet')

fight('Hero')

Successfully created custom character - Hero.

code:
# 1. Level up Woodcutting to Level 30
move('Hero', -1, 0) # Move to Ash Tree
for i in range(169):
    gather('Hero')

# 2. Level up Mining to Level 30
move('Hero', 2, 0) # Move to Copper Rocks
for i in range(169):
    gather('Hero')

# 3. Gather resources for Gold Shield and Sapphire Ring
# Gather 48 dead_wood
move('Hero', 9, 8) # Move to Dead Tree
for i in range(48):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather 120 gold_ore and 3 sapphire
move('Hero', 10, -4) # Move to Gold Rocks
for i in range(120):
    gather('Hero') # Assuming sapphires are gathered alongside ore

# Gather 16 piece_of_obsidian from Imps
move('Hero', 0, 13) # Move to Imp
for i in range(16):
    fight('Hero')

# Gather 4 demon_horn from Demons
move('Hero', 1, 13) # Move to Demon
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
    
# Gather 3 magical_cure
move('Hero', 3, 6) # Move to Magic Rocks
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather 5 vampire_blood from Vampires
move('Hero', 10, 6) # Move to Vampire
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# 4. Process materials
move('Hero', -2, -3) # Move to woodcutting station
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)
move('Hero', 1, 5) # Move to mining station (forge)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 15)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 4)

# 5. Craft final items
move('Hero', 3, 1) # Move to gearcrafting station
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
move('Hero', 1, 3) # Move to jewelrycrafting station
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 1)

# 6. Equip items
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'sapphire_ring', 1)

# 7. Fight the Bat
move('Hero', 11, 7) # Move to Bat
fight('Hero')

code:
# Part 1: Level up professions
# Leveling Woodcutting to 35
# Level 1 -> 11 (on Ash Tree)
move('Hero', 6, 1)
for i in range(38): # XP for lvl 1-10
    gather('Hero')
# Level 11 -> 20 (on Spruce Tree)
move('Hero', 1, 9)
for i in range(48): # XP for lvl 11-20
    gather('Hero')
# Level 20 -> 30 (on Birch Tree)
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for i in range(58): # XP for lvl 20-30
    gather('Hero')
# Level 30 -> 35 (on Dead Tree)
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(35): # XP for lvl 30-35
    gather('Hero')

# Leveling Mining to 35
# Level 1 -> 11 (on Copper Rocks)
move('Hero', 2, 0)
for i in range(38):
    gather('Hero')
# Level 11 -> 20 (on Iron Rocks)
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for i in range(48):
    gather('Hero')
# Level 20 -> 30 (on Coal Rocks)
move('Hero', 1, 6)
for i in range(58):
    gather('Hero')
# Level 30 -> 35 (on Gold Rocks)
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(35):
    gather('Hero')

# Part 2: Gather resources
# Get Life Crystal from Lich
move('Hero', 9, 7)
fight('Hero')
# Gather mob drops
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero') # Demon Horns
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero') # Cursed Books
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero') # Vampire Blood
move('Hero', 0, 13)
for i in range(36):
    fight('Hero') # Pieces of Obsidian from Imps

# Gather raw materials
move('Hero', 9, 8) # Dead Wood
for i in range(72):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', -3, 7) # Magic Wood
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 10, -4) # Gold Ore & Sapphires
for i in range(120):
    gather('Hero')
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 3, 6) # Magical Cures
for i in range(5):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', -1, 7) # Diamond
gather('Hero')

# Part 3: Crafting
# Craft intermediate materials
move('Hero', 1, 5) # Mining Station (Forge)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 15)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 9)
move('Hero', -2, -3) # Woodcutting Station
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 8)

# Craft final items
move('Hero', 1, 3) # Jewelry Crafting
craft('Hero', 'diamond_amulet', 1)
craft('Hero', 'sapphire_ring', 1)
move('Hero', 3, 1) # Gear Crafting
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)

# Part 4: Equip gear and fight
equip('Hero', 'artifact2', 'life_crystal')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'diamond_amulet')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'sapphire_ring')

# Part 5: Kill the Bat
move('Hero', 11, 7)
fight('Hero')

Successfully created custom character - Hero.

code:
# Step 1: Defeat Lich for the third Life Crystal
move('Hero', 9, 7)
fight('Hero')
equip('Hero', 'artifact2', 'life_crystal')

# Step 2: Level up Woodcutting to level 30
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for i in range(169):
    gather('Hero')

# Step 3: Level up Mining to level 30
move('Hero', 2, 0)
for i in range(169):
    gather('Hero')

# Step 4: Gather resources for the Gold Shield
# Gather 4 Demon Horns from Demons
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(4):
    fight('Hero')
# Gather 48 Dead Wood
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(48):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 56 Gold Ore
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(56):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 2 Sapphires
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')
# Gather 1 Magical Cure
move('Hero', 3, 6)
gather('Hero')

# Step 5: Craft the required items
# Craft 6 Dead Wood Planks
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)
# Craft 7 Gold bars
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 7)
# Craft the Gold Shield
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)

# Step 6: Equip the shield and fight the Bat
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
move('Hero', 11, 7)
fight('Hero')

code:
# Part 1: Gather wood and level up Woodcutting
# Leveling from 1 to 20 by gathering Ash Wood (Lvl 1)
# Need 4560 XP total for Lvl 20. 4560 / 50 XP per action = 92 actions.
# We also need 24 ash_wood, so we gather 92 total.
move('Hero', -1, 0)
for i in range(92):
    gather('Hero')

# Leveling from 20 to 30 by gathering Birch Wood (Lvl 20)
# Need 3850 XP total for Lvl 30 starting from Lvl 20. 3850 / 50 = 77 actions.
# We also need 40 birch_wood, so we gather 77 total.
move('Hero', 3, 5)
for i in range(77):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather Dead Wood (Lvl 30) - 90 needed
move('Hero', 9, 8)
for i in range(90):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather Magic Wood (Lvl 35) - 30 needed. Skill is now high enough.
move('Hero', -3, 7)
for i in range(30):
    gather('Hero')

# Part 2: Gather ore/gems and level up Mining
# Leveling from 1 to 15 by gathering Iron Ore (Lvl 10)
# Need 3010 XP total for Lvl 15. 3010 / 50 = 61 actions.
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for i in range(61):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather Jasper Crystal (Lvl 15) - 2 needed
move('Hero', 0, 6)
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')

# Leveling from 15 to 20 by gathering Iron Ore (Lvl 10)
# Need 1550 XP from Lvl 15 to 20. 1550 / 50 = 31 actions.
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for i in range(31):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather Sapphire (2), Topaz (3) from Coal Rocks (Lvl 20)
move('Hero', 1, 6)
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero') # Gather Sapphire
for i in range(3):
    gather('Hero') # Gather Topaz

# Leveling from 20 to 30 by gathering Magical Cure (Lvl 20)
# Need 3850 XP. 3850 / 50 = 77 actions.
# We also need 10 magical_cure, so we gather 87 total.
move('Hero', 3, 6)
for i in range(87):
    gather('Hero')

# Gather Gold Ore (336) and Strange Ore (40). Skill is now high enough.
move('Hero', 10, -4)
for i in range(336):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', -1, 7)
for i in range(40):
    gather('Hero')

# Part 3: Gather monster drops
move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero') # Wolf for 5 wolf_hair
move('Hero', 10, 6)
for i in range(18):
    fight('Hero') # Vampire for 18 vampire_blood
move('Hero', 8, 7)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero') # Death Knight for 3 red_cloth
move('Hero', 1, 13)
for i in range(13):
    fight('Hero') # Demon for 13 demon_horn and 13 piece_of_obsidian
move('Hero', 10, 1)
for i in range(7):
    fight('Hero') # Owlbear for 7 owlbear_hair
move('Hero', -1, 13)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero') # Cultist Acolyte for 3 magic_stone and 3 cursed_book
move('Hero', 4, 8)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero') # Bandit Lizard for 5 lizard_skin
move('Hero', 0, 13)
for i in range(35):
    fight('Hero') # Imp for 35 piece_of_obsidian

# Part 4: Craft intermediate and final items
# Crafting at Mining Station
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 8)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 12)
craft('Hero', 'gold', 42)

# Crafting at Woodcutting Station
move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 8)
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 9)
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 6)

# Crafting at Weaponcrafting Station
move('Hero', 2, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_sword', 1)

# Crafting at Jewelrycrafting Station
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'topaz_ring', 2)
craft('Hero', 'topaz_amulet', 1)

# Crafting at Gearcrafting Station
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)
craft('Hero', 'strangold_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'ancient_jean', 1)

# Part 5: Equip the new gear
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'gold_sword')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')
unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'strangold_armor')
unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'ancient_jean')
unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'gold_boots')
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'topaz_amulet')

# Part 6: Fight the boss
move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')
